name: agentdash
description: AgentDashboard — 统一看板系统，管理多设备、多项目中 AI Agent 的协同工作

scripts.dev:mono: pnpm run kill-ports && concurrently -k -n server,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:frontend-wait"
scripts.dev:joint: pnpm run kill-ports && concurrently -k -n server,local,frontend -c blue,magenta,green "pnpm run dev:server" "pnpm run dev:local" "pnpm run dev:frontend-wait"
scripts.dev:local: node scripts/wait-for-ready.js 3001 /api/health 120 && cargo run --bin agentdash-local -- --cloud-url ws://127.0.0.1:3001/ws/backend --token dev --accessible-roots . --name dev-local --backend-id local-dev-1
scripts.dev:backend: pnpm run kill:backend && cargo run --bin agentdash-server
